nodes.label: SCFF (Self-Contrastive Forward-Forward)
nodes.rationale: Forward-only, label-free contrast built by SUMMATION (x_pos=2x, x_neg=x_k+x_n, shared W1=W2 so input size never grows). Removes FF's supervised negative-data dependency; the only rule local AND derivative-free AND forward-only AND unsupervised at once.

nodes.label: Forward-Forward (Hinton 2022)
nodes.rationale: Two forward passes, per-layer goodness loud on real / quiet on fake, no gradient across a layer. Weakness = the negative data (label-corrupted border pixels: supervised, MNIST-only).

nodes.label: Goodness function (‖h‖^2)
nodes.rationale: Per-layer activation energy; the only signal each layer needs. Draft-6 uses the SUM form G=‖h‖^2 (not mean/M) so theta=2.0 is reachable under plain online SGD without per-weight optimizer state — substrate-faithful.

nodes.label: Collaborative FF (CFF)
nodes.rationale: Each layer optimizes a weighted sum of all layers' goodness, restoring some cross-layer coordination via a coarse scalar signal.

nodes.label: Mono-Forward
nodes.rationale: A single forward pass, contrast generated internally, no separate negative pass; most hardware-friendly when a forward pass is expensive (a capacitor must recharge).
